versionPolicy.patch: Additive template docs, validation refinements, metadata additions, and bug fixes that do not require project-owned content changes.
versionPolicy.minor: New Project Layer capabilities, new required files, migrations, or structural changes that need upgrade review.
versionPolicy.major: Reserved for the first stable 1.0 Project Layer contract.

placeholders.ACTIVE_PLAN_ID: Initial plan ID in PL-YYYYMMDD format
placeholders.ACTIVE_WORK_ID: Canonical active work-unit ID in PL-YYYYMMDD-descriptive-slug format
